# Fra-Ber Tex Car Seat and Fabric Cleaner and Stain Remover

- 

€11,93





Unit price
/ per 

Format: 600 ml
600 ml

Quantity

notifications_active
Notify me



### THE BENEFITS OF TEX

Tex by Fra-Ber is an active foam stain remover and cleaner for car seats and fabrics that deeply cleans without leaving residue.

Main features:

- 
Active foam: the product creates a foam that cleans surfaces without wetting them.

- 
Cleans and hygienises**, removing unpleasant odours*: it leaves surfaces and fabrics clean and scented for longer;

- 
Suitable for cleaning fabric interiors: the product is suitable for cleaning all types of materials and fabrics, including upholstery, carpet and seats;

- 
Fragrance: it leaves a pleasant clean scent after each application.

* The mechanical action of the cloth exerted by the operator also helps to remove the substances responsible for unpleasant odours, along with the dirt.

** The term “hygienises”, if present, refers to a physical or mechanical action. For example, the mechanical action of the cloth exerted by the operator.

### TEX IS IDEAL

- For cleaning car seats, floor mats and all fabric surfaces and upholstery;

- For dry stain removal without the need for water to clean interior car fabrics and upholstery;

- As a ready-to-use product that’s easy to apply and quickly removes localised stains.

### HOW TO USE TEX

We recommend using Tex as a stain remover for interior car fabrics and upholstery.

Main steps:

- Carefully vacuum the fabrics to be treated;

- Shake before use;

- Spray the product from a distance of about 20 cm, holding the can in a vertical position;

- Wipe with a clean cloth and wait for it to dry.

Use: use the product pure.

### SAFETY INFO & DATA SHEET

PRODUCT CODE

70901 - TEX 600ML SPRAY GAS

SAFETY INFORMATION

![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0566/8850/9136/files/Simboli_pericolo_2.png?v=1698148518)![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0566/8850/9136/files/Simboli_pericolo_5.png?v=1698148518)

DANGER**

**H222** Extremely flammable aerosol.

**H229** Pressurised container: May burst if heated. 

**H318** Causes serious eye damage.

**P101** If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand.

**P102** Keep out of reach of children.

**P210** Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking. 

**P211** Do not spray on an open flame or other ignition source.

**P251** Do not pierce or burn, even after use. 

**P280** Wear protection/face protection.

**P305+P351+P338 IN CASE OF CONTACT WITH THE EYES**: rinse carefully with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do. Keep on rinsing. 

**P410+P412** Protect from sunlight. Do no expose to temperatures exceeding 50 o C/122 o F. 

**Contains**: SODIUM LAUROYL SARCOSINATE.

**Contains among other ingredients**: equal to or greater than 5% but below 15%: anionic surfactants, aliphatic hydrocarbons. Less than 5%: non-ionic surfactants. Perfume.

## Why Choose FRA-BER

![image](//shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/Piu_acquisti_piu_risparmi_x50.svg?v=1698322795)

##### MORE YOU BUY MORE YOU SAVE!
Our products are concentrated for greater effectiveness and are also sold in savings size, with discounts available for multiple quantity purchases, you can save time and money!

![image](//shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/Spedizioni_x50.svg?v=1698322828)

##### SHIPMENTS ALL OVER ITALY AND EUROPE
We ship our products all over Italy, including islands, and to all countries in Europe, to receive them directly and comfortably to your home or business address!

![image](//shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/Spedizione_gratuita_x50.svg?v=1698322847)

##### FREE EU SHIPPING ON ORDERS OVER 110 € WITH A FREE GIFT INCLUDED
Shipping to Italy is free for all orders over €65 and includes one of our specially selected gifts!

![image](//shop.fra-ber.it/cdn/shop/files/Pagamenti_sicuri_x50.svg?v=1698322860)

Pay safely online using all major payment methods such as credit card, bank transfer or in 3 interest-free installments with Paypal.
